label: Batch A: Villa Savoye Image Candidates

policy.note: This card prepares a single owner discussion. It does not record decisions or approve public display.

summary.decision_effect: No public-ready changes are allowed from this card; any positive direction opens or confirms a separate reviewed step.

owner_question: Soll Villa Savoye Bildmaterial nur blockiert bleiben, oder soll genau ein Bild in eine separate Quellen-/Credit-Pruefung?
recommended_stance: If no public preview is needed now, leave all three blocked.
If a preview is needed, open a separate source-basis review before any public-ready change.

options.label: Keep all blocked
options.effect: All three image candidates remain review-only; no public display is prepared.

options.label: Open one source/credit review
options.effect: Owner names exactly one image candidate for a separate provenance, license and credit review. No public-ready flag changes.

options.label: Needs more context
options.effect: Codex/Claude prepare a stronger source comparison before asking again.
